description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the adnrv/texlive:tools Docker image. Include a before_script that sets TEXMFHOME=$(kpsewhich -var-value TEXMFHOME), defines LOCALTEX=$TEXMFHOME/tex/latex, and creates the directory $LOCALTEX. Add a build job (default stage) that runs the before_script, then executes ln -s $(pwd) $LOCALTEX/mcv-academic, cd example, and make all, and publishes all files matching ./example/example-*.pdf as artifacts. No caches, rules, or additional services are required.
